summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enhanced Aurum Quant Live Demo. Successfully verified core functionality including demo opening, price chart display, simulation start/stop, algorithm thinking panel, and trading features. Found modal stability issues and some UI/UX concerns that need attention.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal occasionally closes unexpectedly during testing, requiring reopening
Speed control buttons (1x, 2x, 5x, 10x) selectors are inconsistent - visible but not reliably clickable
Price element shows '+67.4%' instead of actual XAUUSD price values during some test runs

integration_issues.issue: Price updates not consistently visible in some test runs - simulation may run but display doesn't always update

design_issues.issue: Thought bubbles generation is working but inconsistent during rapid testing cycles

passed_tests: Main page loads correctly with Aurum Quant branding
Live Demo button successfully opens modal
XAUUSD price chart displays with proper time series data
Balance, Trades, Win Rate, P&L stats visible in header
Algorithm Thinking panel structure and header present
All indicator cards displayed (RSI, Trend, EMA 20, EMA 50, Support, Resistance)
Initial position status shows 'No open position'
Play button successfully starts simulation (status changes to LIVE)
Algorithm generates thought bubbles when simulation runs
Position tracking works (saw SELL positions with P&L calculations)
Chart displays Support/Resistance lines when simulation active
Market phase information displayed (markup, markdown phases)
Live price updates when simulation running
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate and fix modal stability issues in LiveDemo component. The demo works well when opened properly but has occasional closing issues during extended interaction. Also review speed control selectors and ensure price display always shows actual XAUUSD values instead of percentage values. Consider adding data-testid attributes to improve component testability.
